title: OKPF Provenance
description: Provenance record tracking the origin and transformation history of pack content.

created_by.description: Contributor ID of the person or system that assembled this pack.

notes.description: Human-readable notes about the provenance of this pack.

sources.description: Original sources from which content was derived.

id.description: Unique identifier for this source within the provenance record.

title.description: Title or name of the source.

uri.description: URI or URL identifying the source (may be a DOI, URL, or internal reference).

accessed.description: ISO 8601 date the source was accessed or captured.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the source content at time of capture.

license.description: SPDX license expression for the source.

description.description: Description of the source and what it contributes to this pack.

author.description: Author or creator of the source.

published.description: Publication or creation date of the source.

transformations.description: Ordered log of transformations applied to source content to produce pack artifacts.

input_sources.description: IDs of source records used as input to this transformation.

output_artifacts.description: IDs of content artifacts produced by this transformation.

performed_by.description: Contributor ID of the person or system that performed this transformation.

description.description: Human-readable description of what was done.

tool.description: Tool or system used for automated transformations.

reviewed_by.description: Contributor ID who reviewed this transformation for accuracy.
